About this feed — The NON file contains XBRL DEI metadata for 183 8-K / 1 8-K/A filings across 104 BDCs filed in February 2026. 8-K item text (distributions, officer changes, capital raises) was sourced from EDGAR press release documents and cross-referenced with the portfolio data. Events are ranked by investment relevance.
⚠ Data sourcing note: All dollar figures in this feed (dividend amounts, redemption rates, AUM figures, earnings metrics) are externally sourced from Bloomberg, Alternative Credit Investor, and EDGAR exhibit text — they are not derivable from the raw XBRL files. Verify critical figures independently before citing.
